text.title: shadcn/ui Architecture Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply shadcn/ui Architecture end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: establish-primitive-dir
step.action: Declare `components/ui/` for vendored shadcn primitives; document boundary.

step.name: variant-policy
step.action: Set max_variants_per_prop=6; require compoundVariants for state combos.

step.name: wire-codeowners
step.decision-gate: Reject merges to primitives without design-system review.

step.name: wire-lint
step.action: Add rules: no-arbitrary-tailwind, no-business-import-in-ui, require-forwardRef, require-displayName.
step.decision-gate: Reject PR with lint violations on primitive dir.
